customManagers.description: Inline container images annotated '# renovate: docker=NAME'. The native kustomize manager already covers images:/helmCharts: in every kustomization.yaml; this only catches images pinned directly in a manifest (currently just it-tools' Deployment) and CNPG Cluster imageName pins.

packageRules.description: Keep tag-based pinning. kustomize images use newTag, and Renovate SKIPS any image carrying both newTag and a digest, which would freeze future updates. Flip to per-image digest pinning later if desired.
Auto-merge Renovate's own image bumps straight to main with NO PR (it ships ~daily; branch automerge commits to a temp branch and fast-forwards into main when nothing is failing).
